5 Feature Matrix

All opt-in features available on MeepleCard. Features are additive and composable.

Entity Typesgame player session agent document chatSession event toolkit kb_card custom
Layout Variantsgrid (7:10 cover) · list (56px thumb) · compact (dot only) · featured (16:9) · hero (full-bleed)
Visual EffectsGlassmorphism · Warm shadows · Entity glow rings · Shimmer on hover · Cover scale(1.06) · Badge pulse animation
3D FlipPerspective 1200px · Framer Motion 0.7s · Entity-colored back header · Diagonal stripe pattern
Quick ActionsHover-reveal glass buttons · Staggered float-up animation · Entity-colored hover glow · WCAG 44px touch targets
Info ButtonOpens ExtraMeepleCardDrawer (tabbed detail view) · Supports game/agent/chat/kb entities
Tag StripVertical left-edge tags · Presets + custom · Overflow indicator · Pulse for "new"
WishlistHeart toggle button · Animated fill · Optimistic update
Hover PreviewFloating panel with description, designer, categories, mechanics, complexity
Bulk SelectionCheckbox overlay · Multi-select mode · Visual selected state
Drag & DropDrag handle · Reorder support · Drag data
Status Badgesowned wishlisted played borrowed for-trade · Multi-status arrays
Navigation FooterRelated entity icons (📄🤖🎲) · Configurable links · Entity-aware routing
Agent Action FooterCreate Agent / Chat with Agent · KB status indicator
Session FeaturesStatus badge · Player popup · Turn sequence · Score table · Action buttons · Back content
Agent FeaturesStatus badge (active/idle/training/error) · Model info · Stats display · Capabilities
Chat FeaturesStatus badge · Agent info · Game context · Stats · Preview · Unread count
Document FeaturesIndexing status badge (indexed/processing/failed) · KB worst-status rollup
Snapshot HistoryTime slider · Snapshot selection · Time travel overlay
Entity LinksLink count badge · Preview row · Cross-entity relationships
Compound APIMeepleCards.Game .Player .Session .Agent .Document .ChatSession .Event .Toolkit .KbCard
PerformanceReact.memo · Lazy-loaded images · CSS-driven animations · Reduced motion support
AccessibilityWCAG AA · Keyboard nav (Tab/Enter/Space) · aria-label auto-gen · Focus rings · Screen reader support
